message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "Virologist" as Virologist
participant "Bag" as Bag

Bag->>Virologist: 1 removeEffect(virologist)
Virologist->>Bag: 2 getExtralInventorSize()
Bag->>Bag: 3 extralInventorSize
Bag-->>Virologist: 4 getInventorSize()
Virologist-->>Bag: 5 inventorSize

Bag->>Virologist: 6 setInventorySize(inventorSize - extralInventorSize)
Virologist-->>Bag: 7
Bag-->>Virologist: 8

note right of Virologist
Decrease the inventor size by the bag's extra inventor size
@endnote

@enduml
